comments_critique.summary: The discussion highlights Tony Hoare's continued dedication to learning and humility despite his significant achievements and retirement. Commenters reflect on the admirable traits of lifelong learning and intellectual humility.

comments.author: blundergoat
comments.text: The detail about Hoare sitting in the front row at conferences taking notes on specialized topics (after retiring from Oxford, after a Turing Award, after decades of foundational work) is the part of this piece that will stick with me. There's a certain kind of senior figure who stops learning once they reach eminence. Hoare clearly wasn't that. Meyer's phrase "a combination of pride and humility" nails it.
comments.analysis: This comment provides a well-observed and credible reflection on Hoare's character, emphasizing his humility and dedication to continuous learning.
